title: My Sister Took Mom's Condo, Dumped Her In A Medicaid Home. So I Became Her Caregiver In Disguise.
description: When my mother’s Alzheimer’s worsened, my sister convinced my family I was incompetent, secretly took Mom’s $280K condo, and dumped her in a bare-bones nursing home. For three years I worked under a false identity as a companion in that facility, collecting evidence of her fraud. In the end, the court voided the deed, awarded me the condo, and banned my sister from ever seeing Mom again. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #ElderAbuseJustice
thumb_text: I BECAME A FAKE CAREGIVER AND SENT HER TO PRISON

thumb_lines.text: DUMPED MOM IN A MEDICAID HOME AND BLAMED ME
I WENT UNDERCOVER AS A CAREGIVER
